titleStmt.title: SII 17.136: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 136. (A.R. No. 116-A of 1904.) TĪRTHANAGARI, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west and south walls of the central shrine in the Śivāṅkurēśvara temple.
This record is dated in the 98th day of the 3rd year.

It registers the gift of 50 vēli of land similar to No. (136) above, in Pūvālasundaranallūr (renamed as Kulōttuṅgachōḷanallūr), a hamlet of Tiruttiṉainagar in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Mēṟkā-nāḍu in Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti maikoṇṭāṉ virutarācapayaṅkaravaḷaṉāṭṭu meṟkāṉāṭṭu jayaṅ koṇṭacoḻac caruppetimaṅkalattu tiruttiṉainakar makā[deva*]r koyil tevakaṉ mikkum śrīmāhecuvarak kaṇkāṇi ce
Ittevaṟku veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷuk kiṟuppatāka Ivvūrp piṭākai pūvālacuṉtaranallūrile Aimpatiṟṟuveli nilam muṉṟāvatu mutal devatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu muṉpuṭaiyārum paḻam perum brammatecamāy varukiṟapaṭiyum munniṟai kaṭṭinapaṭiyum
ttuṅkacoḻanallūreṉṉum perāl veṟu piṟittu variyilārum varikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvari tarac coṉṉom Ippaṭi munṟāvatu mutal kaikkoṇṭu devaṟku veṇṭu nivantañ celuttap paṇṇuka kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻak kaḷappāḷarāyaṉ Eḻuttu villava
ṭṭu yāṇṭu mūṉṟāvatu ṉāḷ toṇṇūṟṟeṭṭiṉāl brasādañceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi virutarājapayaṅkaravaḷaṉāṭṭu meṟkāṉāṭṭu brammatecam jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻac caruppeti maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruttiṉainakaruṭaiya makādevaṟku veṇṭum niva
Ivvūrp piṭākai pūvālacuntaranallūril Iṭukiṟa nilattukku Ūr(ṟ)kkaṇakkaṉ kaṟpakappiri� ṉeḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭi pañcavanmātevivatikkuk kiḻakku vīranārāyaṇavāykkālukku vaṭakku kālaṟutikku teṟkku tiripuvanamātevivatikku kiḻakku Ivvākkālu
tevaṟkku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟum Iraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟu munṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu teṟkaṭaiyavum Ūr(ṟ) kiḻyiṟaiyili nikki munpuṭaiyārum paḻamperum brammadejamāy varukiṟapaṭiy munpiṟai kaṭṭinapaṭiyum taviṟttu yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu mutal
ṟinta kulottuṅka coḻanallūr nilam Aimpatiṟṟu veliyiṉāl nilaopāti ḷa 2 100 7 10�m tara Orpāti I 9 100 6 10 3�m Ippaṭi tavira yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu mutal veli Oṉṟukku nellu Irupatinkalamāka Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa nellu
Āyirakkalattukkum puravari cikaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi tañcāvūr kiḻavan Eḻuttu mukaveṭṭi teṅkūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu mukaveṭṭi talainārkiḻān Eḻuttu mukaveṭṭi vāṭakai Uṭaiyān Eḻuttu puravari cikaraṇanāyakam Iḷaṅkārikuṭaiyān
ṉainallūruṭaiyan Eḻuttu puravari cikaraṇanāyakam poṉṉuḻān Eḻuttu puravari cikaraṇanāyakam vāṇikan Eḻuttu vayanāṭṭaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu cittarāyaṉ Eḻuttu vayirātarājan Eḻuttu kaḷap pāḷarāyaṉ Eḻuttu:
Digital edition of SII 17.136 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
